log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:12+3=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:14+-2=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Kender — Unarmored Caster.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
--- Kender — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Ogre (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 54/59
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Kender — Unarmored Caster.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15 | Cond: [charmed_hp, incapacitated]
--- Kender — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Ogre (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:20+-2=18 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Kender — Unarmored Caster.
→ Javelin: [d20:12+6=18 vs AC 15] HIT! 14 damage. Kender — Unarmored Caster HP: 53/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Kender — Unarmored Caster (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:18+9=27 vs AC 15] HIT! 24 damage. Kender — Unarmored Caster HP: 29/67
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Kender — Unarmored Caster.
→ Javelin: [d20:12+6=18 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 damage. Kender — Unarmored Caster HP: 14/67
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (14/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Kender — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Kender — Unarmored Caster.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Kender — Unarmored Caster (distant).
REASONING: Can't reach melee (50ft). Javelin at Kender — Unarmored Caster.
--- Kender — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 14/67 | AC: 15 | Cond: [invisible] | Conc: Greater Invisibility
REASONING: Concentrating on Greater Invisibility. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:1+3=4 vs DC 16] FAIL! 5 psychic damage. HP: 133/138
